title: Three Gold Keys to a Healthy Life
passage: Healthy eating is important for us. What and how should we eat to be healthy? First, we need to have enough food, never too much or too little. Second, it's very important for us to have a balanced diet(饮食平衡). Different kinds of foods are necessary(必要的), such as bread, meat, fish, eggs, milk, fruit and vegetables. Bread gives us energy(能量). Meat, fish, eggs and milk help our bones grow(骨骼生长). Fruit and vegetables make us more healthy. Third, we should eat regularly(有规律地). Some students don't have a regular breakfast or don't eat anything in the morning. It is bad for their health. In fact, a good breakfast keeps us strong. In short, we should not only eat enough, good and healthy food but also eat regularly.

questions.prompt: To be healthy, how many ways are mentioned in the passage?
What does the underlined word "It" refer to?
options: Not having a regular breakfast or not eating anything in the morning.

questions.prompt: What helps our bones grow according to the passage?
What is your healthy eating habit? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I always make sure to eat a balanced breakfast and plenty of fresh vegetables every day.
Because this provides me with enough energy and vitamins to focus on my schoolwork.
Maintaining these good habits is key to building a strong and healthy body.
I enjoy eating fast food and sweet snacks whenever I feel hungry.
Because they taste delicious and save a lot of cooking time.
In conclusion, eating whatever makes you happy is the best choice.
